Benefits

One Tool. Multiple Devices. Endless Possibilities.

One Tool. Multiple Devices. Endless Possibilities.

With Cal.com Companion, managing your calendar has never been easier. Whether you're on mobile, desktop, or using your browser, you can seamlessly sync and schedule no matter where life takes you.

Get started with Cal.com

1

Stay organized across all devices

Access your calendar on mobile, desktop, or browser, and stay synchronized across all platforms for maximum convenience.

2

Effortless scheduling & customization

Personalize alerts, time zones, and meeting settings to your needs, making scheduling easier and more efficient.

3

Boost your productivity

Save time and reduce scheduling conflicts with automated scheduling and fast access across all devices.

Available everywhere

Cross-platform availability

Cross-platform availability

Cal.com Companion ensures that you can manage your schedule anytime, anywhere, on any device. Whether you're using your phone, browser, or desktop, you’ll have everything you need to stay productive.

Get started with Cal.com

Mobile app

Take your schedule on the go with the Cal.com Companion mobile app. Available on both Android and iOS, the app lets you schedule meetings, check availability, and receive real-time updates, all from the palm of your hand.

The Cal.com Companion browser extension brings your scheduling tools directly to Chrome, enhancing your web experience. It lets you schedule and view meetings without ever leaving your browser.

Get started with Cal.com

Connect all your calendars

Sync Google Calendar, Outlook, and more with Cal.com to keep your schedule organized and avoid double-booking.

A tailored link ready for every scenario

Generate custom scheduling links for meetings, events, or consultations, and manage all your bookings with ease.

Workflow automation

Automate reminders, follow-ups, and cancellations to save time and streamline your scheduling process.

Route bookers to the right person

Automatically direct bookers to the right person based on team availability or event type.

Scheduling for your team

Allow team members to manage availability and automate group scheduling, all in one platform.

FAQ

Frequently asked questions about Cal.com Companion

Frequently asked questions about Cal.com Companion

Have questions about Cal.com Companion? Here are some of the most frequently asked questions to help you get the most out of your Cal.com Companion experience.

Have questions about Cal.com Companion? Here are some of the most frequently asked questions to help you get the most out of your Cal.com Companion experience.

Get started with Cal.com

On which platforms can I use Cal.com Companion?

Cal.com Companion works across all major platforms so you can manage your schedule wherever you are. Today, it is available as a mobile app, browser extension, and desktop app, each designed to fit seamlessly into your workflow.

  • Mobile: iOS and Android.

  • Browser: Chrome, with Safari, Microsoft Edge, and Firefox coming soon.

  • Desktop: macOS, Windows and Linux

All versions stay in sync with your Cal.com account in real time.

How do I install Cal.com Companion?

Installing Cal.com Companion takes just a few clicks, depending on the platform you prefer.

  • Mobile app: Download from the Apple App Store or Google Play Store.

  • Browser extension: Install directly from the Chrome Web Store, Firefox Extension Store, Edge or Safari Extension Store.

  • Desktop app: Download for macOS, Windows or Linux from Cal.com.

Once installed, simply sign in with your Cal.com account and you are ready to go.

Does Cal.com Companion cost anything?

No. Cal.com Companion is completely free to use. All apps and extensions are included as part of your existing Cal.com plan at no additional cost.

There are no hidden fees, no separate subscriptions, and no feature limitations for Companion tools. If you already use Cal.com, Companion simply makes it easier to use everywhere.

Is the Cal.com Companion be available for browsers other than Chrome?

Yes. The browser extensions are available for Chrome, Safari, Microsoft Edge, and Firefox.

You can join the waitlist for each browser to get early access and updates as soon as they are released.

Will Cal.com Companion continue to get updates and new features?

Absolutely. Cal.com Companion is actively developed as an open source project and continuously improved. New features, performance upgrades, and platform expansions are released on a regular basis.

Because Cal.com is API first and open by design, Companion tools evolve alongside the core scheduling platform, ensuring long term reliability and flexibility.

Do I need a Cal.com account to use Companion?

Yes. Cal.com Companion works as an extension of your Cal.com account. Once you sign in, your availability, bookings, and preferences are automatically synced across all devices.

If you do not have an account yet, you can create one in minutes and start using Companion right away.

Who is Cal.com Companion made for?

Cal.com Companion is built for anyone who relies on scheduling as part of their daily work. It is ideal for individuals, teams, and organizations that want quick, reliable access to their Cal.com schedule across devices.

Whether you are a freelancer managing client calls, a team coordinating meetings, or an organization handling scheduling at scale, Cal.com Companion fits naturally into your workflow and helps you stay efficient wherever you work.

Download Cal.com Companion now!
